text:
Created attachment 196996
handbrake-1.1.2.patch

HandBrake 1.1.2 has been released.
Attached `handbrake-1.1.2.patch` upgrades multimedia/handbrake port.

Since this version,
libdvdread and libdvdnav have been updated to 6.0.0.

Please apply to Ports tree.
Thank you.
